channel.title: Projects on ARLOOR
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on ARLOOR

item.title: DERA
item.description: This is a Java reference implementation of dynamic event-driven actors runtime aiming at providing adequate abstraction levels and mechanisms for modelling and developing (distributed) event-based systems.

item.title: hyde-hyde
item.description: Hyde-hyde is a responsive Hugo theme inspired by @spf13’s Hyde and its variant Nate Finch’s blog.

item.title: LaraMod
item.description: LaraMod is another modularisation effort to systematically organising a Laravel based project.
